title: -Slightly- expanded Choices
description: Many possibilities with mods like Create, Ad Astra and many more.
body:
![SeC banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3d5e04e614581f3b2b067bac10f321763e6fd9f4.png)

#### **This modpack expands the possibilities, such as industrialization or space exploration.**
---
### **This Modpack includes:**
- As the core of this modpack space exploration with the mod Ad Astra and the period of industrialization with the mod Create
- world generation enhancements with mods like Towns and Towers, Wilder Wild, William Wythers Overhauled Overworld
- QoL features like Inventory Management, Jade, KleeSlabs, Overflowing Bars, Roughly Enough Items, Stack Refill
- general optimizations, which should not be missing in any modpack like Iris, Lithium, Sodium
---
